overall.description: A first-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077, beginning with driving along an elevated industrial highway through Night City, passing rusted storage tanks and under dense power lines, then transitioning to walking on a graffiti-covered sidewalk. The overcast afternoon creates a grey, atmospheric urban industrial environment with moderate traffic.

slowing down and approaching the sidewalk transition area

segments.scene_description: Driving along an elevated industrial highway in an overcast urban environment. The camera passes under a dense network of power lines with a tall circular tower visible on the right and industrial smokestacks on the left. Several vehicles pass by in the opposite lane as the road continues toward a highway overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial sidewalk with graffiti-covered walls alongside highway

events.description: character exits vehicle and transitions to walking on the sidewalk
moving from highway road to pedestrian sidewalk next to industrial buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk next to industrial buildings, passing graffiti-covered walls and metal fencing

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
black metal security fence with vertical bars
yellow corrugated metal industrial building with red markings

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from driving to walking, the scene shifts to a concrete sidewalk alongside the highway. The camera moves past walls covered in graffiti and metal fencing, with industrial buildings on the right and the highway ramp visible to the left. The environment maintains the industrial aesthetic with rusted structures and urban decay.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a high-speed drive along an industrial highway to a slow walk through a decaying urban corridor. It begins by gliding under a dense network of power lines, passing a tall circular tower and industrial smokestacks while vehicles stream by in the opposite lane toward a highway overpass. As the motion shifts from driving to walking, the perspective moves onto a concrete sidewalk running parallel to the road. The scene then expands to reveal walls covered in graffiti and metal fencing, with the highway ramp receding to the left. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the industrial zone, passing rusted structures and weathered buildings under a heavy, overcast sky.
